response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and exposure to high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry infrastructure, or growth/measurement systems, which are the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title history is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there is little evidence of the cross-team platform leadership or statistical/experimental analysis depth expected at IC6.
strengths: 13+ years across diverse stacks (TS/Node, C/C++, Java, D) with low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, trunk-based dev, CI/CD, open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
Teaching/mentorship track record via workshops, dojos, and Selenium/TDD courses
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flighting, or A/B testing infrastructure
Lacks explicit telemetry/metrics platform work and statistical/experimental analysis depth
Career level is Senior/Staff with no clear Principal-scope, multi-team platform leadership evidence

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale service background
